name: Vishwaraj Sugar Industries Limited
summary: Vishwaraj Sugar Industries Limited manufactures and sells sugar and other related products in India. The company operates through five segments: Sugar, Co-Generation, Distillery, Indian Made Liquor, and Vinegar. It also produces distillery products, including ethanol, and rectified and extra-neutral spirits; and bagasse, molasses, brewed vinegar, compost, press-mud, carbon dioxide, etc., as well as blends and bottles Indian made liquor. In addition, the company is involved in the co-generation of electricity with an installed capacity of 36.4 MW. It sells its whiskey products under the Our Choice, Your Choice, District-1, and VSL Black brand names. The company was formerly known as Vishwanath Sugar and Steel Industries Limited and changed its name to Vishwaraj Sugar Industries Limited in December 2012. Vishwaraj Sugar Industries Limited was incorporated in 1995 and is based in Belgaum, India.
